resources.title: AI Coding Prompt Guide
resources.summary: A visual quick-reference guide for choosing plan mode or a short chat, writing clearer AI prompts, and handling Git and GitHub follow-through with less friction.
resources.label: AI coding

current.alt: AI Coding Prompt Guide featured image.

prompts.square:
COLORS:

* {{primary_background}} = {{bright_blue}}

* {{mint_green}} = #8BD8BD
* {{bold_blue}} = #0037BE
* {{bright_blue}} = #0063F2
* {{orange}} = #F49F1C
* {{deep_navy}} = #012072

* {{accent_palette}} = all colors EXCEPT {{primary_background}}

---

Abstract geometric background inspired by a modern sail or forward motion shape, using {{primary_background}} as the dominant background color.

Create evenly distributed geometric “sail-like” panels that frame all edges, top, bottom, and corners with consistent visual weight on each side. The shapes should feel balanced and symmetrical overall, without any one side appearing heavier than the others.

Use layered colors from {{accent_palette}} as accents within the border shapes. Do not use {{primary_background}} in any border or sail elements. Reserve it strictly for the background.

Draw clean, overlapping angular panels with smooth, blended transitions and a very soft, fine-grained texture. Ensure the border elements taper naturally toward the center without intruding into the main content space.

Composition should clearly frame a calm, open central area for text placement, with strong visual focus on the center.

Professional, training-focused, confident corporate style. No white, no glow, no light beams, no dark vignette, no clutter. Maintain balanced contrast to support overlay text.

OVERLAYS:
Title: AI CODING PROMPT GUIDANCE
Symbol: A colorful <AI> symbol
Person: A photorealistic image of two happy and diverse people facing the camera, who are AI-coding using prompts.
Overlays should be bold and large, filling the center of the {{primary_background}} space.

STRICT AVOIDANCE RULES:
* Visual cliches like AI brains and circuits.
* Imagery that anthropomorphizes AI.
* Overlays should not go past the outside
prompts.landscape: Recreate the provided template image in landscape orientation. Reduce graininess. Avoid the top and bottom 25%.
prompts.portrait: Recreate the provided template image in portrait format. Reduce graininess. Avoid the top and bottom 25%.

prompts.square:
Use the provided template image as a visual style and composition reference. Create a new image of the same type. Have the people sit together at a desk. 

Change the subtitle to "WORKSHOP PRE-WORK" and get rid of that symbol

Avoid the top and bottom 25%.
prompts.landscape: Recreate the provided template image as a landscape. Avoid the top and bottom 25%.
prompts.portrait: Recreate the provided template image in portrait format. Avoid the top and bottom 25%.
